LAW AND MOTION, DEPT 302, MOTION FOR RELIEF FROM FORFEITURE, CALENDAR OF DEC-15-1999, DENIED PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER. WEIGHING THE EVIDENCE THE COURT FINDS MR. WETZEL'S DECLARATION INCREDIBLE. THERE IS A TWO WK PERIOD BTW WHEN THE COURT CLERK POSTED THE NOTICE OF TRIAL 11/08/99 & WHEN HE CLAIMS HIS MAIL WAS TAMPERED WITH - THE WEEK OF 11/22/99. (RULING CONT'D, SEE BELOW)
(RULING CONT'D FROM ABOVE) WHILE THE MOVING PARTY DOES NOT SPECIFICALLY SEEK RELIEF PER CCP 473 THE COURT WEIGHED IT AS A REMEDY. THE MOTION FOR RELIEF PER CCP 1179 & CCP 473 ARE DENIED.
